posts.author: ElaraBloom
posts.text: Just finished my first attempt at sourdough bread using a starter I made from leftover store-bought yeast (yes, I know it's not technically sourdough but the crust is lovely!)."category":"Lifestyle
posts.explanation: This post describes a harmless hobby and cooking experiment without spreading misinformation or soliciting harm.
